result.stdout:
redline 1.1.0 - Compare Word documents and generate redline diffs

Usage:
  redline <original.docx> <modified.docx> <output.docx> [options]

Arguments:
  original.docx    Path to the original document
  modified.docx    Path to the modified document
  output.docx      Path for the output redline document

Options:
  --author=<name>                   Author name for tracked changes (default: Redline)
  --detail-threshold=<0.0-1.0>      Comparison granularity (lower = more detailed, default: 0)
  --case-insensitive                 Ignore case differences
  --detect-moves                     Enable move detection
  --simplify-move-markup             Convert moves to del/ins for Word compatibility
  --move-similarity-threshold=<val>  Jaccard threshold for move matching (default: 0.8)
  --move-minimum-word-count=<val>    Min words for move detection (default: 3)
  --no-detect-format-changes         Disable formatting change detection
  --no-conflate-spaces               Distinguish breaking/non-breaking spaces
  --date-time=<ISO8601>              Custom timestamp for revisions
  -h, --help                         Show this help message
  -v, --version                      Show version information

Examples:
  redline contract-v1.docx contract-v2.docx redline.docx
  redline draft.docx final.docx changes.docx --author="Legal Review"
  redline old.docx new.docx diff.docx --detect-moves --simplify-move-markup
  redline old.docx new.docx diff.docx --detail-threshold=0.5 --case-insensitive

Environment Variables:
  REDLINE_DEBUG=1  Show detailed error information
